title: mentzelia lagarosa
intro: Mentzelia lagarosa, also known as the desert or wild orangel, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The roots and leaves of Mentzelia lagarosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
